# Baby

## Tags
child, childproof, children

## Categories
accessibility, people

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/baby)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Baby;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Baby { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
